name: Veprove s Krenem (Piquant Pork with Horseradi
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Lean pork, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork in hot butter on all sides in a deep kettle.
2. Add water and all other ingredients except horseradish. Simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until tender.
3. Transfer meat to a hot platter; keep hot.
4. Force stock through sieve or puree in electric blender.
5. Pour stock over meat.
6. Top with horseradish.
7. Serve with boiled potatoes.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
